lineDescription: 40x150mm - 7 Kinds||Size: 40mm x 150mm||Material: PP60 - Hotmelt||Print Colour: CMYK||Finishing: MATTE LAMINATE||Provided on 76mm Cores||Hand/Machine Applied: HAND APPLIED||Supply: *** PLEASE KEEP BLANKS ON ROLLS TO MINIMUM ***||Qty: 6,500||500 x Minty Choc Chip||1,000 x Greek Yoghurt 1,000 x Coffee 1,000 x Pine-lime 1,000 x Strawberry 1,000 x Mango 1,000 x Choc Banana Group discount applied
